results.description: DAVAO CITY (MindaNews /12 June 2026) – ​The death of a student is a quiet horror every educator dreads. In the medical school where I teach, our institutional reflex to tragedy is swift, quiet, and unconditioned by blame: when a foreign student under our care tragically drowned, the priority was immediate, seamless assistance to the [...]

results.title: new Zealand great Kane Williamson retires from international cricket

results.title: Timmy, Germany's humpback whale, likely lived for only 5 days after controversial rescue effort
results.description: The humpback whale that kept Germany spellbound for months likely lived for roughly five days after the final controversial rescue attempt failed to guide it back to its natural habitat in the Atlantic Ocean, officials said Friday.
